name: org.lightpaper/lightpaper-mcp
description: API-first publishing platform. Publish markdown as permanent web pages with quality scoring.

environmentVariables.name: LIGHTPAPER_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your lightpaper.org API key (lp_free_xxx). Optional — the server can create accounts interactively.

environmentVariables.name: LIGHTPAPER_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL for the lightpaper API. Defaults to https://lightpaper.org.
